name: Deputy
description: Workforce management platform for scheduling, time tracking, and compliance.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Deputy
2. Go to your account icon → API Access
3. Click 'Get Access Token'
4. Enter your Deputy URL and the token below

credentialFields.label: Deputy Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Deputy URL (e.g. https://yourcompany.na.deputy.com). Found in your browser address bar.

credentialFields.label: Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Deputy → Account → API Access → Get Access Token.
